warnings: 3 pre-existing CSS warnings about gap-[var(--gap/gap-N,...)] (expected, ignored)
Webpack asset size warnings for editor.js (300 KiB) and screen bundle (345 KiB) - not new errors

themeHeading.note: Both pass eyebrow, heading, headingSize=3, description, buttons, columns=2

tablistStickyClasses.classes: tabs-tablist hidden md:flex flex-col gap-4 py-16 flex-1 md:sticky md:top-[calc(var(--fixed-elements-height)+32px)] md:self-start

tabButtonClasses.classes: tabs-button border-l border-t border-b border-charcoal rounded-l-3xl p-6 flex flex-col items-start justify-center w-full text-left transition-all cursor-pointer min-h-[140px] hover:bg-accent-light

tabsPanelsClasses.tsx: tabs-panels flex-1 flex flex-col md:bg-accent-lighter md:rounded-3xl md:p-6 gap-4 md:gap-0 md:h-full
tabsPanelsClasses.php: tabs-panels flex-1 flex flex-col md:bg-accent-lighter md:rounded-3xl md:p-6 gap-4 md:gap-0
tabsPanelsClasses.difference: TSX has md:h-full, PHP does not
tabsPanelsClasses.impact: Minor - could affect editor vs frontend desktop layout height

tabButtonTitleClasses.classes: tabs-button-title font-heading text-header-3 md:text-[2.5rem] leading-none w-full

descriptionAnimationClasses.note: PHP includes animation classes (overflow-hidden, transition-all, duration-300, max-h-20/max-h-0, opacity-100/opacity-0) for frontend animation. TSX does not include these (editor does not animate). This is expected.

ariaAttributes.note: PHP includes role=tablist, aria-orientation, role=tab, aria-selected, tabindex for accessibility. TSX omits these (editor handles its own a11y). This is expected.

wrapperClasses.classes: tabs-item group transition-all overflow-hidden md:sticky md:top-[calc(var(--fixed-elements-height)+32px)] md:self-start, border border-charcoal rounded-3xl md:border-0 md:rounded-none, open:bg-accent open:border-accent md:open:bg-transparent

summaryClasses.classes: tabs-item-summary md:!hidden p-6 list-none flex gap-4 items-start appearance-none [&::-webkit-details-marker]:hidden cursor-pointer hover:bg-accent-light group-open:hover:bg-accent transition-colors

accordionToggleIcon.note: Both have identical +/- icon structure with shrink-0 ml-auto relative w-5 h-5 mt-[9px]

desktopTitleClasses.classes: tabs-item-desktop-title hidden md:block font-heading text-header-3 md:text-[2.5rem] mb-8

tabDescriptionInContent.php: rendered when tabDescription is not empty
tabDescriptionInContent.impact: Minor - mobile-only description appears on frontend but not in editor preview

hoverClassToggling.note: JS toggles bg-accent, hover:!bg-accent, selected -- matches PHP initial state for active tab

descriptionAnimation.note: JS adds/removes max-h-0 opacity-0 / max-h-20 opacity-100 mt-6 -- matches PHP initial state classes exactly

issues.description: TSX .tabs-panels has md:h-full class that PHP does not have
issues.impact: Could cause minor height difference between editor and frontend on desktop
issues.recommendation: Either add md:h-full to PHP or remove from TSX for consistency

issues.description: PHP renders a tabs-item-description paragraph (md:hidden) inside .tabs-item-content, but TSX does not have this element
issues.impact: Mobile-only tab description appears on frontend but not in editor preview
issues.recommendation: Add a non-editable description display in TSX for editor preview parity, or accept this as an expected editor/frontend difference
